fr:mainmatter.fr:p: If A is a proposition and B\colon A\to \mathsf {Type} is family of propositions, then the dependent sum \mathchoice {\textstyle \sum _{ \mathopen {}\left \lparen x:A\right \rparen \mathclose {} }}{\textstyle \sum _{ \mathopen {}\left \lparen x:A\right \rparen \mathclose {} }}{\scriptstyle \sum _{ \mathopen {}\left \lparen x:A\right \rparen \mathclose {} }}{\scriptscriptstyle \sum _{ \mathopen {}\left \lparen x:A\right \rparen \mathclose {} }}{Bx} is a proposition.
